name: Ember Catacombs
description: A smoldering ruin where cinders still drift through collapsed halls.

rooms.name: Collapsed Gate
rooms.description: Broken stone and ash mark the threshold of the ruins.

encounters.name: Cinder Scouts
encounters.description: A small probing force guarding the entrance.

rooms.name: Silent Forge
rooms.description: Cold anvils line the walls while embers pulse under the floor.

encounters.name: Forge Keeper
encounters.description: An elite fireborn defender blocks the inner path.

rooms.name: Ash Sanctum
rooms.description: A circular chamber where the final ward once burned bright.
